signals.name: MC_TritiumID
signals.description: Device identifier. 0x00004003

signals.name: MC_SerialNumber
signals.description: Device serial number, allocated at manufacture.

signals.name: MC_ActiveMotor
signals.description: The index of the active motor currently being used.

signals.name: MC_TxErrorCount
signals.description: The DSP CAN transmission error counter (CAN 2.0)

signals.name: MC_RxErrorCount
signals.description: The DSP CAN receive error counter (CAN 2.0)

signals.name: MC_BusVoltage
signals.description: DC bus voltage at the controller.

signals.name: MC_BusCurrent
signals.description: Current drawn from the DC bus by the controller.

signals.name: MC_MotorVelocity
signals.description: Motor angular frequency in revolutions per minute.

signals.name: MC_VehicleVelocity
signals.description: Vehicle velocity in metres / second.

signals.name: MC_PhaseCurrentB
signals.description: RMS current in motor Phase B.

signals.name: MC_PhaseCurrentC
signals.description: RMS current in motor Phase C.

signals.name: MC_Vq
signals.description: Imaginary component of the applied non-rotating voltage vector to the motor.

signals.name: MC_Vd
signals.description: Real component of the applied non-rotating voltage vector to the motor.

signals.name: MC_Iq
signals.description: Imaginary component of the applied non-rotating current vector to the motor. This current produces torque in the motor and should be in phase with the back-EMF of the motor

signals.name: MC_Id
signals.description: Real component of the applied non-rotating current vector to the motor. This vector represents the field current of the motor.

signals.name: MC_BEMFq
signals.description: The peak of the phase to neutral motor voltage.

signals.name: MC_BEMFd
signals.description: By definition this value is always 0V.

signals.name: MC_Supply15V
signals.description: Actual voltage level of the 15V power rail.

signals.name: MC_Supply1V9
signals.description: Actual voltage level of the 1.9V DSP power rail.

signals.name: MC_Supply3V3
signals.description: Actual voltage level of the 3.3V power rail.

signals.name: MC_MotorTemp
signals.description: Internal temperature of the motor

signals.name: MC_HeatsinkTemp
signals.description: Internal temperature of Heat-sink (case).

signals.name: MC_DspBoardTemp
signals.description: Temperature of the DSP board.

signals.name: MC_TripOdometer
signals.description: Distance the vehicle has travelled since reset.

signals.name: MC_DCBusAh
signals.description: Charge flow into the controller DC bus from the time of reset.

signals.name: MC_SlipSpeed
signals.description: Slip speed when driving an induction motor.
